name: engineering-workflow
description: Unified engineering workflow: alignment → PRD → vertical-slice issues → AFK handoff → TDD execution → architectural sanity → triage. Run /init-workflow once per repo to seed the pipeline order in CLAUDE.md. Skills: grill-with-docs, context-bootstrap, to-prd, to-issues, agent-brief, triage, tdd-vertical, diagnose, zoom-out, deep-modules.
